---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for meet-sum
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred solution. How would it work? What would the CLI look like?

```bash
# Example of how you'd use the new feature
meet-sum <new-command> ...
```

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you prefer the proposed solution?

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that would help explain the feature.
